_comments.isActive: MASTER SWITCH — true = modal is enabled, false = modal never shows (overrides everything)
_comments.showOnce: SHOW ONCE PER USER — true = shows only the very first time a user visits (stored in localStorage 'hasSeenPromoModal'). Set false to disable this behaviour.
_comments.showDaily: SHOW ONCE PER DAY — true = shows once per calendar day per browser (stored in localStorage 'lastSeenPromoModalDate'). Takes priority over showOnce. Set false to disable.
_comments.targetDate: COUNTDOWN TARGET — ISO date string for the countdown timer (e.g. '2026-12-31T23:59:59'). Remove or set to null/empty string to hide the countdown.
_comments.note: Priority order: isActive → showDaily → showOnce. If both showDaily and showOnce are false, the modal shows on EVERY page load.
